name: Maya Patel
bio: Met during freshman orientation. We backpacked through Southeast Asia after graduation and have been inseparable ever since.

name: Tom Eriksson
bio: My first manager at the company. Taught me everything about product thinking. We grab coffee most weeks.

name: Priya Nair
bio: Grew up on the same street. Our families have been friends for decades. Drifted apart after she moved to London but we mean to catch up more.

name: Lucas Andersen
bio: We met at the climbing gym two years ago. He's the reason I got into bouldering. We usually train together on Saturdays.

name: Sophie Müller
bio: Study-abroad roommate in Berlin. We've kept a monthly book club going over video call for three years now.

name: David Osei
bio: My best friend from high school. We started a band together that never took off, but we still share playlists every week — or at least we're supposed to.

name: Anna Lindqvist
bio: We worked on a high-stakes launch together and became close through the stress of it. Now she's freelancing but we still debrief over lunch.

name: Rafael Costa
bio: Met in an online gaming community during college, then discovered we lived in the same dorm. He moved back to São Paulo but we still try to game together online.

name: Chloe Beaumont
bio: We met at a yoga retreat in Bali three years ago and somehow ended up living in cities just two hours apart by train. We rotate visiting each other every few weeks.

name: James Whitfield
bio: My closest friend through secondary school. We had a falling out in our twenties but reconnected at a mutual friend's wedding last year. Still rebuilding the habit of staying in touch.

name: Yuki Tanaka
bio: We collaborated on a cross-cultural UX project between our two companies. Her attention to detail completely changed how I approach design reviews. We exchange feedback on side projects regularly.

name: Marcus Johansson
bio: We started chatting at a local 10K race and discovered we live three blocks apart. Now we run together every Tuesday morning and grab breakfast after.
